## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Module Affected

Backend, frontend, docs, infrastructure, sample data, or a named future module.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.

## Tests

List commands run and results.

## Security And Privacy Considerations

Describe any effects on authentication, authorisation, data handling, file upload, logging, or responsible use.

## Documentation

List docs updated or explain why documentation was not needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] Tests or checks were run where practical.
- [ ] No secrets, real sensitive data, or real personal data were added.
- [ ] Responsible-use boundaries remain intact.
